summary: Iteration 17: Full Admin Dashboard testing completed. All backend APIs (17 tests) and frontend UI components verified. Role approval/rejection workflow working correctly. CSV exports authenticated properly. Rejected users blocked from login (HTTP 403).

backend_api: Admin login POST /api/auth/login → 200 with token and admin role
Admin stats GET /api/admin/stats → 200 with correct counts (users, articles, properties, payments)
GET /api/admin/notifications → 200 with notifications list, total, pending_count
Filter notifications by status (pending/approved/rejected) → all working
Create test user with role request (auteur/agent) → pending notification created
PUT /api/admin/notifications/{id}/action with action=approve → user role updated, status=actif
CSV exports require authentication → 401/403 without token
frontend_ui: Admin login redirects to /profil, shows 'MON DASHBOARD' button
Stats cards show correct counts (7 Users, 1 Article, 2 Annonces, 1 Paiement)
DEMANDES tab shows pending count badge (1)
Pending requests banner '1 demande en attente d'approbation' visible
Status filter dropdown (Tous, En attente, Approuvé, Rejeté) works
Pending requests show APPROUVER and REJETER buttons
Approved/Rejected requests do NOT show approve/reject buttons
Delete button (trash icon) present on all request cards
CSV button present on Requests tab
UTILISATEURS tab: Table with users, search, role filter, CSV, suspend/delete actions
ARTICLES tab: Table with articles, search, category filter, CSV, view/edit/delete actions
ANNONCES tab: Table with properties, search, type/status filters, CSV, status dropdown, view/edit/delete
PAIEMENTS tab: Table with payments, status/method filters, CSV, status dropdown, delete action

websocket_features_tested.role_update_event: Code review confirms WebSocket role_update event sent on approve/reject (admin.py lines 417-424 and 438-444). Frontend WebSocketContext.js handles role_update and calls refreshUser() on approve or logout on reject.

critical_code_review_comments: All admin dashboard features working correctly
CSV exports properly use axios with responseType:blob instead of window.open() - authenticated requests working
Role approval updates user.role and user.status correctly
Rejected users receive HTTP 403 on login attempt with clear message
WebSocket role_update integration in place for real-time notification

existing_pending_request.note: Still pending - available for manual testing

seed_data_creation: Created multiple TEST_ADMIN_ prefixed users during pytest to test approval/rejection flows. Cleanup fixture removes them after test completion.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 17 validated all admin dashboard features: (1) Role request CRUD - approve/reject/delete all working, (2) CSV exports for users/articles/properties/payments/role-requests all use authenticated axios requests, (3) Rejected users blocked from login with HTTP 403, (4) WebSocket role_update event sent on approve/reject to update user in real-time. Admin credentials: matrixguinea@gmail.com / strongpassword123. One pending request still available for testing: auteur_cf9afe (dd11df82-8aef-4b67-893c-f0a6d8b6ac48).

mocked_apis_list: Resend Email Service - OTP returned as dev_otp in API response
